title: Capture material
subtitle: Snap a page, book, or worksheet — up to 10 photos.

permission.title: We need camera access for a moment
permission.body: So you can photograph your material. You can change this any time in Settings.

chip.tilt: Hold the phone a bit straighter

tilt_warn: Hold the phone a bit straighter

strip.long_press_hint: Long-press a thumbnail to delete it.

picker.title: Where does this go?
picker.no_folder: No folder — right in the subject
picker.no_subjects: You don't have a subject yet. Add one from the home screen first.

gallery.permission_title: We need permission to read your photos
gallery.permission_body: So you can pick photos of your material that are already on your phone.
